---
id: set-vrm-look-cursor
title: "Set VRM to look at cursor"
description: "Configure the VRM model to look at the mouse cursor position."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set VRM to look at cursor"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/look/cursor"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Configure the VRM model to look at the mouse cursor position.

  as={"h2"}
